name: newtype-codex
description: Newtype content-team workflow for Codex, packaged as reusable skills plus custom agent templates.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent content workflows for research, writing, editing, fact-checking, and archiving.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native packaging of Newtype's content-team workflow. It bundles workflow skills and custom agent templates while intentionally leaving out OpenCode-specific runtime integration.
defaultPrompt: Use Newtype to research and draft an article.
Continue the content workflow with Newtype.
